data.title: Manar Abu Dhabi's second edition artist line-up announced by DCT Abu Dhabi, celebrating creativity.
data.description: Taking place in Abu Dhabi, UAE on October 17, 2025, Manar Abu Dhabi is a public light art exhibition managed by the Department of Culture and Tourism. The event aims to promote creativity and showcase the varied landscapes of the emirate. This year marks the second edition of Manar, indicating its growing popularity and success.

data.title: AI sector analysts predict a $8 trillion opportunity, asserting sustainable growth despite concerns of a bubble.
data.description: Wall Street analysts believe there is no bubble in the AI sector and project a significant growth opportunity. The industry's sustainable growth could unlock an $8 trillion opportunity, with expected total revenue ranging from $5 trillion to $19 trillion according to analysts from Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Wedbush Securities. They believe that the current AI investment levels are sustainable and that effective deployment of AI could generate productivity gains exceeding investments. The JPMorgan team led by Samik Chatterjee predicts a significant increase in AI-related capital expenditures this year. The analysts also highlighted that while investment levels are sustainable, the ultimate winners in the AI sector are not yet clear.

data.title: Canada Goose to report Q2 FY 2026 results on November 6, 2025; ended Sept 28, 2025. Conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: Canada Goose Holdings Inc. intends to reveal its performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on November 6, 2025. The quarter ended on September 28, 2025. The results will be announced before the market opens, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for 8:30am ET on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast of the call on the company’s website at http://investor.canadagoose.com. Canada Goose Holdings Inc. is listed on both the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol GOOS.

data.title: Sanofi's Wayrilz gets CHMP nod for EU approval to treat immune thrombocytopenia, impacting millions.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing expectations and signaling a strong job market. Additionally, the stock market saw a 2% increase in value, reaching an all-time high of 30,000 points. These positive indicators suggest a robust economic recovery following the challenges posed by the pandemic.

data.title: Exxon Mobil sells 4M barrels of Guyanese crude to Indian refiners. Indian Oil buys 2M GAH and HP buys 2M Liza and Unity Gold.
data.description: Exxon Mobil Corporation reportedly completed the sale of 4 million barrels of Guyanese crude oil to Indian Oil Corp. and Hindustan Petroleum Corp. in India. This marks the first purchase of Guyanese crude oil by the Indian oil refiners, with Indian Oil acquiring 2 million barrels of Golden Arrowhead (GAH) crude for the first time. The shipment is scheduled to arrive between December and January. Hindustan Petroleum Corp also purchased 2 million barrels of Liza and Unity Gold crudes, expected for delivery in late 2025 or early 2026. The full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Gibson to open third retail store - Gibson Garage Miami - in Spring 2026 at Miami's Wynwood Art District.
data.description: In Spring 2026, Gibson, the renowned brand in the music industry, will be opening its third retail store, known as the Gibson Garage Miami, in Miami's vibrant Wynwood Art District. The opening of this new location signifies Gibson's continued global expansion efforts.

data.title: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. ends EPFA and withdraws preliminary proxy statement, effective on October 24, 2025.
data.description: A technology company based in Midland, Texas, New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: NUAI), specializing in digital infrastructure and power assets, has served notice to terminate its equity purchase facility agreement (EPFA). The termination is set for October 24, 2025. The decision comes as the Company believes it currently holds adequate capital and does not foresee the need for additional funding from the EPFA.

data.title: Kinaxis introduces Maestro Agents to enhance supply chain orchestration, aiding planners in decision-making.
data.description: Kinaxis Inc. revealed the launch of Maestro Agents, showcasing advancements in AI-driven decision intelligence for supply chains. This development, accessible to Kinaxis customers and integrated within Kinaxis Maestro®, introduces AI-infused digital assistants that are aware of the context. This new tool aids planners in swiftly transitioning from identifying problems to taking necessary actions, converting disruptions into advantageous scenarios, and enhancing the durability of the underlying supply chains. Maestro Agents are designed to help in accelerating responses to supply chain challenges, thus supporting efficiency and adaptability in the industry.

data.title: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. reports positive Q3 2025 results with $479.6M in System Sales, $71.2M Revenue, $23.6M Income before income taxes, $25.8M Adjusted EBITDA, and 1.4% Same Store Sales Growth. Total YTD 2025 Revenue $201.1M, Income before income taxes $53.3M, and Net income $39.3M. 3 new A&W restaurants opened.
data.description: A&W Food Services of Canada Inc. reported positive financial results for Q3 2025, with a 1.4% Same Store Sales Growth and System Sales Growth of 3.1%, totaling $479.6 million. Total revenue for the quarter was $71.2 million, a decrease of 6%. Income before taxes increased by 163% to $23.6 million, and Adjusted EBITDA rose 5% to $25.8 million. Operating costs decreased by 31% to $31.8 million, with the opening of 3 new A&W restaurants during the quarter. Net income for Q3 2025 was $17.6 million. YTD 2025 showed positive growth in System Sales and Adjusted EBITDA, reflecting a successful year for A&W.

data.title: Ryan is ranked #1 in 2025 Best Places to Work in Baton Rouge by Baton Rouge Business Report.
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana, Ryan, a prominent global provider of tax services and software, has achieved the top position on the 2025 Best Places to Work in Baton Rouge list by the Baton Rouge Business Report. This recognition highlights the company's dedication to cultivating exceptional workplace environments, prioritizing team member happiness, and making substantial investments in their workforce. Being named among the leading workplaces in the capital region is a great honor for Ryan as they continue to prioritize employee satisfaction and growth within the organization.
